results.title: PDP crisis: Court dismisses Wabara, others’ suit seeking INEC’s recognition
results.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja on Friday dismissed a suit filed by Sen. Adolphus Wabara-led Board of Trustees (BoT) of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) seeking an order for the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) to recognise its faction. Justice Salim Ibrahim, in a judgment, described the suit as “an abuse of court process, [...] The post PDP crisis: Court dismisses Wabara, others’ suit seeking INEC’s recognition appeared first on 21st CENTURY CHRONICLE .

results.title: IRGC claims strikes on US drone depot and AI hub in Bahrain
results.description: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims that it destroyed a depot housing US unmanned surface vessels and the “main artificial intelligence center”
